exercises.name: Vectors and Dot Products
exercises.description: Understanding vector operations, magnitude, and the geometric intuition behind dot products using NumPy.
exercises.snippet:
import numpy as np

# Define two vectors
a = np.array([2, 3, 1])
b = np.array([1, 4, 2])

# Dot product
dot = np.dot(a, b)
print(f'Dot product: {dot}')

# Magnitude
mag_a = np.linalg.norm(a)
print(f'|a| = {mag_a:.4f}')
